examples: In "To You, the Birdie!", the action was reconstructed around a badminton game, shuttlecocks landing on the ground like the sound of shattered crockery.
I called for the butler to clear up the broken crockery.
I picked up crockery, put it on the tray.
But here, at least, is a chance for America to piece together some of the crockery.
Aside from the delicious soups, salads and chicken dishes, the furniture, paintings and crockery are all up for sale.
